summary: The user is exploring ways to reduce their daily commute expenses, currently spending around $200 per month on a 7:15 AM train to work. They are considering alternatives such as monthly passes and bike-sharing programs, while also seeking advice on planning their bike commute and staying safe in traffic.
facts: The user has been taking the 7:15 AM train to work over the past month. The user's daily commute cost is around $200 per month. The user has been getting ready for work around 6:30 AM. The user makes a cup of coffee and a slice of toast with avocado for breakfast before heading out the door. The user has been sitting in the quiet car most days to get work done or respond to emails before arriving at the office.
